resources.string: Videos saved on this device will appear here.\nPull down to refresh.
This app needs permission to read videos stored on your device so it can list and play them.
Paste a direct stream link, or an IPTV .m3u playlist

These channels are publicly available and community-maintained, so availability and stream quality can change at any time. Some streams take a few seconds to load. You may need a VPN if content is geo-restricted in your region.
Enter or pick a URL first
Stream live TV and sport using free, community-maintained playlists, just like you would in VLC.

Open Network stream and choose a public playlist, or paste your own URL.

• Sports: iptv-org.github.io/iptv
• Full lineup (News, Movies, Kids, Music): github.com/Free-TV/IPTV
Tap Load playlist to open the channel list, or Play stream if your link is a single live stream.
Use the channel list to switch between channels. Some streams take a few seconds to load.

• You may need a VPN if content is geo-restricted in your region.\n• Channels are community-maintained, so availability and quality can change at any time.\n• This app plays streams you provide. It does not host or supply any content.
